feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Greg The Awesome Friend (also what was the last game you played?)
My Fat Ass Demands Sustenance To Survive You PEASANT!

No logic my one true weakness
Yeah, I don't like birthday parties, either
entry.content: Yeah, I don't like birthday parties, either

entry.title: These are the people why they have to put hot on hot coffee
I will reincarnate to make your life a living hell
Don't threaten me with a good time
Just in time for Independence Day
Happy #Stolzmonat @Retard4AOC. YOUR president is proud of your efforts
Happy Stolzmonat to everyone in the LGHDTV community
Stolzmonat is the best way to ruin redalertretards day :trollface:
Pick your fighter. Fight degeneracy with patriotism
The way they collapse when some random people refuse to participate in their delusions
When you see something genuinely wild. but it's the internet.
“When you look at the dark side, careful you must be. For the dark side looks back.”
Special place in hell for these people.
When u are just that upset at someone:
The job that does require exactly one dog
entry.content: The job that does require exactly one dog

entry.title: I wouldn't put it past the bastard.
